data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Travel time between locations (if applicable)', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for travel time, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to travel time between locations. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm that the requirement is covered.
gaps: No evidence of travel time validation between locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
